title: Rheumatoid Arthritis: A Comprehensive Review of Etiology, Pathophysiology, and Innovative Therapeutic Advancements.
snippet: Rheumatoid arthritis (RA) is a chronic autoimmune disease characterized by persistent synovial inflammation, cartilage degradation, and bone erosion, ultimately leading to joint deformities and functional impairment. Affecting approximately 1% of the global population, RA imposes a significant burden on healthcare systems and patient quality of life. The di...
